description: Address all critical, high, and medium priority gaps across iOS app, website, backend, and repository health to prepare Wellvo for App Store submission and production launch

userStories.title: Fix CORS policy to restrict allowed origins
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want the edge functions CORS policy restricted to wellvo.net so that arbitrary websites cannot make API calls to our backend.
acceptanceCriteria: Access-Control-Allow-Origin in edge-functions/server.ts is set to https://wellvo.net (not *)
OPTIONS preflight requests return correct origin header
CORS origin is configurable via environment variable ALLOWED_ORIGIN
Requests from other origins receive 403
Edge functions still work when called from the iOS app (no origin header)
userStories.notes: Critical security fix. server.ts line 43 currently allows *.

userStories.title: Add rate limiting middleware to edge functions
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want per-user rate limiting on all edge function endpoints so that brute-force attacks, notification flooding, and abuse are prevented.
acceptanceCriteria: New shared/rate-limiter.ts module with in-memory rate limiting by user ID + endpoint
Default limit: 30 requests per minute per user per endpoint
Stricter limit on invite-receiver: 5 per minute
Stricter limit on on-demand-checkin: 10 per minute
Returns 429 Too Many Requests with Retry-After header when exceeded
Rate limiter is applied in server.ts before routing to handlers
Service-role requests (cron jobs) bypass rate limiting
userStories.notes: All 7 endpoints currently have zero rate limiting.

userStories.title: Add security headers to website via Cloudflare Pages _headers file
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want proper HTTP security headers on all website responses so that XSS, clickjacking, and MIME sniffing attacks are mitigated.
acceptanceCriteria: website/public/_headers file exists with rules for /*
Content-Security-Policy header set (script-src self, style-src self and fonts.googleapis.com, font-src fonts.gstatic.com)
X-Frame-Options: DENY
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()
Headers appear in production build output (dist/_headers)
Website still renders correctly with CSP active
userStories.notes: Currently no _headers file exists for security headers.

userStories.title: Add migration safety gate to CI/CD pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Supabase migrations to require manual approval and take a backup before running so that a bad migration cannot destroy production data.
acceptanceCriteria: supabase-migrations.yml requires environment approval (GitHub environment protection rule)
Workflow runs pg_dump backup before applying any migration
Backup is uploaded as a workflow artifact (retained 30 days)
Each migration runs inside an explicit SQL transaction (BEGIN/COMMIT)
Workflow fails and stops if any migration errors
Verification step checks table count, RLS policy count, and trigger count
userStories.notes: Currently auto-deploys on push with no approval or backup.

userStories.title: Add error logging and monitoring integration
userStories.description: As an operator, I want structured JSON logging and error tracking in edge functions so that production issues are visible and alertable.
acceptanceCriteria: New shared/logger.ts module with structured JSON logging (timestamp, level, path, userId, statusCode, duration, error)
All edge function handlers log request start and completion
Errors include stack traces in log output
server.ts catches unhandled errors and logs them before returning 500
Log output is JSON-per-line format compatible with Docker log drivers
Docker compose adds json-file logging driver with max-size 10m and max-file 3
userStories.notes: Currently only console.error with no structure or aggregation.

userStories.title: Add database backup automation
userStories.description: As an operator, I want automated daily PostgreSQL backups with retention so that data can be recovered in a disaster.
acceptanceCriteria: New coolify/backup-db.sh script that runs pg_dump with compression
Backups stored in /var/backups/wellvo/ with date-stamped filenames
Retention: keep last 30 daily backups, delete older
Script is scheduled via cron (documented in coolify/README-DEPLOYMENT.md)
Backup script validates dump file is non-empty before deleting old ones
README-DEPLOYMENT.md updated with backup setup and restore instructions
userStories.notes: No backup strategy currently exists.

userStories.title: Enable analytics in iOS app
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want TelemetryDeck analytics enabled so that I can measure retention, check-in rates, and conversion metrics from the PRD.
acceptanceCriteria: TelemetryDeck SPM package added to Package.swift dependencies
AnalyticsService.swift uncommented and configured with TelemetryDeck app ID from Info.plist
Events tracked: app_open, check_in_completed, check_in_missed, mood_selected, subscription_started, subscription_cancelled, onboarding_completed, on_demand_checkin_sent
No PII sent in analytics events (no email, phone, or name)
Analytics disabled in DEBUG builds
App builds successfully with analytics enabled
userStories.notes: TelemetryDeck code is commented out in AnalyticsService.swift.

userStories.title: Add 404 page and error boundary to website
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a helpful error page when I visit an invalid URL or when a component crashes so that I'm not left with a blank screen.
acceptanceCriteria: New website/src/pages/NotFound.tsx with branded 404 page (Wellvo styling, link to home)
Catch-all route added in App.tsx: <Route path='*' element={<NotFound />} />
New website/src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx wrapping the app in Layout.tsx
ErrorBoundary shows user-friendly error message with retry button
404 page is responsive and matches site design
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Currently visiting /invalid-path shows blank content.

userStories.title: Add SEO essentials to website
userStories.description: As a marketer, I want sitemap.xml, robots.txt, og:image, and structured data so that search engines can properly index the site and social shares look professional.
acceptanceCriteria: website/public/sitemap.xml listing /, /pricing, /support, /privacy, /terms with lastmod dates
website/public/robots.txt allowing all crawlers and pointing to sitemap
og:image meta tag in index.html pointing to a 1200x630 social preview image
Social preview image generated (green gradient with Wellvo logo and tagline)
Twitter card meta tags added (twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image)
JSON-LD structured data for SoftwareApplication schema on home page
Per-page document titles set via useEffect or react-helmet-async
npm run build succeeds and sitemap.xml is in dist/
userStories.notes: Currently no sitemap, robots.txt, og:image, or structured data.

userStories.title: Add README.md, LICENSE, and .env.example to repository
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want proper repository documentation so that I can understand the project, set up locally, and contribute correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Root README.md with: project description, architecture overview (iOS + Edge Functions + Supabase + Website), local development setup for each component, deployment instructions, link to PRD
LICENSE file (choose appropriate license)
edge-functions/.env.example listing all required env vars with placeholder values and descriptions
website/.env.example if any env vars are needed
CONTRIBUTING.md with PR process, commit message format, and code style expectations
README renders correctly on GitHub
userStories.notes: GitHub landing page is currently blank. No setup docs.

userStories.title: Add iOS unit and integration tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want automated tests for critical business logic so that regressions are caught before release.
acceptanceCriteria: New WellvoTests target in Xcode project
Tests for AuthViewModel: sign in state transitions, validation logic, error handling
Tests for DashboardViewModel: streak calculation, weekly summary computation, receiver card building
Tests for ReceiverViewModel: check-in status tracking, offline queue integration
Tests for OfflineCheckInService: queue, sync, retry logic
Tests for SubscriptionService: tier mapping, entitlement checking
All tests pass with swift test or xcodebuild test
Minimum 15 test cases covering critical paths
userStories.notes: Zero tests currently exist. Focus on ViewModels and Services.

userStories.title: Implement push notification token refresh
userStories.description: As a user, I want my push notification token to stay valid so that I never miss a check-in notification due to an expired token.
acceptanceCriteria: PushNotificationService re-registers token on every app launch (foreground)
Token is compared to stored value; only sends to Supabase if changed
Old tokens marked is_active=false when a new token is registered for the same device
Edge function send-checkin-notification skips is_active=false tokens
Token registration failure is logged (not silently swallowed)
userStories.notes: Tokens expire after ~30 days. No refresh mechanism exists.

userStories.title: Complete iOS accessibility for App Store review
userStories.description: As a visually impaired user, I want full VoiceOver support so that I can use Wellvo independently.
acceptanceCriteria: ReceiverHomeView: check-in button has accessibilityLabel 'I'm OK check-in button' and accessibilityHint
DashboardView: each receiver card has accessibilityLabel with name, status, and streak
All tab bar items have accessibility labels
Mood selector buttons have accessibilityLabel (e.g., 'Select mood: Good')
HistoryView heatmap cells have accessibilityLabel with date and status
Settings toggles have accessibilityLabel describing what they control
Focus order is logical top-to-bottom on every screen
Dynamic Type tested at accessibility sizes (XXXL) without layout breakage
userStories.notes: Apple reviews accessibility. Most VoiceOver labels are missing.

userStories.title: Add duplicate check-in prevention
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to prevent duplicate check-ins for the same receiver on the same day so that data integrity is maintained.
acceptanceCriteria: UNIQUE constraint added on checkins(receiver_id, family_id, DATE(checked_in_at)) via new migration
process-checkin-response edge function uses upsert or checks for existing check-in before insert
Duplicate check-in attempt returns 200 with existing check-in data (not error)
ReceiverHomeView correctly shows already-checked-in state if duplicate detected
Migration applies cleanly on existing data
userStories.notes: Currently can create multiple check-ins per receiver per minute.

userStories.title: Add phone number validation to invite flow
userStories.description: As an owner, I want phone number validation on the invite form so that invalid numbers don't waste SMS credits or create broken invites.
acceptanceCriteria: FamilyView InviteReceiverSheet validates phone format before enabling Send button
Accepts US numbers: (xxx) xxx-xxxx, xxx-xxx-xxxx, +1xxxxxxxxxx, xxxxxxxxxx
Shows inline error message for invalid format
invite-receiver edge function also validates phone format server-side
Invalid phone returns 400 with clear error message
userStories.notes: Currently accepts any string as a phone number.

userStories.title: Add website accessibility fundamentals
userStories.description: As a keyboard-only user, I want focus styles, skip navigation, and ARIA attributes so that I can navigate the website without a mouse.
acceptanceCriteria: Global :focus-visible CSS styles added (visible ring on all interactive elements)
Skip-to-main-content link added as first element in Layout
Header menu toggle has aria-expanded attribute that updates on open/close
Active nav link has aria-current='page'
All emoji content in Home.tsx wrapped with aria-label or role='img'
Tab order is logical through all pages
Color contrast passes WCAG AA (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text)
userStories.notes: No focus styles, no skip nav, no ARIA attributes currently.

userStories.title: Add code splitting and lazy loading to website
userStories.description: As a user, I want fast page loads so that the site feels snappy on mobile connections.
acceptanceCriteria: All page components loaded via React.lazy() with Suspense fallback
Vite config updated with rollupOptions for manual chunk splitting (vendor, pages)
Initial JS bundle under 150KB gzipped
Loading spinner or skeleton shown during lazy load
All routes still work correctly after code splitting
npm run build succeeds and shows multiple chunk files
userStories.notes: Currently single 276KB bundle with all pages.

userStories.title: Add Web App Manifest and apple-touch-icon
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want proper PWA metadata so that the site can be added to home screen with correct icon and name.
acceptanceCriteria: website/public/manifest.json with name, short_name, icons, theme_color, background_color
apple-touch-icon (180x180) generated from Wellvo logo
Favicon in multiple sizes (16, 32, 192, 512) referenced in manifest
index.html links to manifest.json and apple-touch-icon
Lighthouse PWA audit passes installability checks
userStories.notes: Only favicon.svg exists currently.

userStories.title: Add og:image social preview to website
userStories.description: As a marketer, I want a branded social preview image so that links shared on Twitter, Slack, and iMessage look professional.
acceptanceCriteria: 1200x630px og-image.png generated (green gradient, Wellvo logo, tagline 'One tap. Peace of mind.')
Image placed in website/public/og-image.png
og:image meta tag in index.html points to https://wellvo.net/og-image.png
twitter:card set to summary_large_image
twitter:image points to same og-image.png
Image renders correctly when URL is pasted in Twitter/Slack preview tools
userStories.notes: No social preview image exists.

userStories.title: Handle notification permission denial gracefully in iOS
userStories.description: As an owner, I want to be prompted to enable notifications if I denied them previously so that I don't miss escalation alerts.
acceptanceCriteria: App checks notification permission status on each foreground resume
If denied, show a non-intrusive banner on DashboardView explaining why notifications matter
Banner includes 'Open Settings' button that deep-links to iOS Settings > Wellvo > Notifications
Banner is dismissable and doesn't show again for 7 days after dismissal
Receivers see similar banner on ReceiverHomeView if notifications denied
Banner styling matches existing app design (orange tint warning style)
userStories.notes: Currently no re-prompt if user denies push permissions.

userStories.title: Fix silent SMS escalation failure
userStories.description: As an operator, I want SMS failures logged and visible so that I know when Twilio is misconfigured or down.
acceptanceCriteria: escalation-tick edge function logs SMS send attempts with structured logger
SMS failures are caught and logged with error details (not silently swallowed)
If Twilio credentials are missing, function logs a clear warning on startup
Failed SMS attempts recorded in notification_log table with error_message column
New migration adds error_message column to notification_log if not present
userStories.notes: sendSMS() currently fails silently if Twilio not configured.

userStories.title: Add missing database indexes for performance
userStories.description: As a developer, I want proper indexes on frequently queried columns so that dashboard and escalation queries are fast as the user base grows.
acceptanceCriteria: New migration adds: CREATE INDEX idx_families_subscription ON families(subscription_status, subscription_expires_at)
New migration adds: CREATE INDEX idx_receiver_settings_active ON receiver_settings(is_active) WHERE is_active = true
New migration adds: CREATE INDEX idx_invite_tokens_phone ON invite_tokens(phone)
Migration applies cleanly on existing data
EXPLAIN ANALYZE on dispatch_scheduled_checkins shows index usage
userStories.notes: Missing indexes on subscription status, active settings, and invite phone.

userStories.title: Validate App Store webhook token properly
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the subscription webhook to reject invalid app_account_tokens so that subscription state cannot be corrupted by spoofed requests.
acceptanceCriteria: subscription-webhook validates app_account_token is a valid UUID format before querying
If user not found for token, returns 400 with error instead of falling back silently
Webhook logs token lookup failures for debugging
Existing subscription flow still works end-to-end
userStories.notes: Currently accepts garbage app_account_token values silently.

userStories.title: Add website privacy-first analytics
userStories.description: As a product owner, I want privacy-first analytics on the website so that I can measure traffic and conversions without violating the privacy policy.
acceptanceCriteria: Plausible Analytics or Cloudflare Web Analytics script added to index.html
No cookies set by analytics (privacy-first, cookieless)
Analytics script loads asynchronously and doesn't block rendering
Custom events tracked: pricing_page_view, download_cta_click, support_page_view
Privacy policy accuracy verified (claims match implementation)
No GDPR cookie banner needed (cookieless analytics)
userStories.notes: Privacy policy claims 'privacy-first analytics' but none integrated.

userStories.title: Add centralized error handling in iOS services
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a consistent error handling pattern across all services so that errors propagate correctly and users see helpful messages.
acceptanceCriteria: CheckInService.respondToCheckIn propagates errors instead of just printing
All service methods that catch errors re-throw with WellvoError type
WellvoError enum covers: network, auth, notFound, serverError, offline, unknown
ViewModels display user-facing error messages from WellvoError.localizedDescription
No silent error swallowing (print-only) remains in any service file
userStories.notes: Some services just print errors without propagating.

userStories.title: Add GDPR data export completeness
userStories.description: As a user exercising my GDPR rights, I want data export to include all my data so that the export is legally complete.
acceptanceCriteria: export_user_data RPC updated to include checkin_requests data
Export includes notification_log entries for the user
Export includes invite_tokens created by the user (with token values redacted)
Export includes alert history for families the user owns
JSON output structure documented in a code comment
Migration applies cleanly
userStories.notes: Current export missing checkin_requests, notification_log, and alerts.

userStories.title: Add GitHub Actions notifications on build failure
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to be notified when CI/CD pipelines fail so that broken builds are caught quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: All three workflows (ios-build-deploy, edge-functions-deploy, supabase-migrations) have failure notification step
Notification via GitHub Actions built-in (creates issue or uses actions/github-script to comment)
Failure notification includes: workflow name, branch, commit SHA, error summary, link to run
Notification only fires on failure (not success)
userStories.notes: Currently no notification on any CI/CD failure.

userStories.title: Add container vulnerability scanning to CI
userStories.description: As a security engineer, I want Docker images scanned for vulnerabilities before deployment so that known CVEs don't reach production.
acceptanceCriteria: edge-functions-deploy.yml adds Trivy scan step after Docker build, before push
Scan fails the workflow if HIGH or CRITICAL vulnerabilities are found
Scan results uploaded as GitHub Actions artifact
MEDIUM and below are logged as warnings but don't block deployment
userStories.notes: No vulnerability scanning in any CI workflow.

userStories.title: Add website testing infrastructure
userStories.description: As a developer, I want automated tests for the website so that regressions in routing, pricing display, and legal pages are caught.
acceptanceCriteria: Vitest and @testing-library/react added as dev dependencies
vitest.config.ts configured with jsdom environment
Test for App.tsx: all routes render without crashing
Test for Pricing.tsx: all 3 plan names and prices display correctly
Test for Header.tsx: navigation links present and mobile menu toggles
Test for Privacy.tsx and Terms.tsx: page renders with correct heading
All tests pass with npm run test
Minimum 8 test cases
userStories.notes: No test infrastructure or tests exist for the website.

userStories.title: Add CLAUDE.md project configuration
userStories.description: As an AI-assisted developer, I want a CLAUDE.md file so that Claude Code has project context for future development sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Root CLAUDE.md with: project overview, tech stack summary, directory structure, build commands for each component, key architecture decisions, testing commands
References prd.json for outstanding work
References progress.txt for completed work
Includes common gotchas (e.g., Supabase config from Info.plist, Deno for edge functions)
File is under 200 lines
userStories.notes: No CLAUDE.md exists. Critical for Ralph loop context.
